required_relationships: Represent ray/vector cues as thin glowing curve_polyline or dotted tracers, not thick arrow primitives.
Lay compared components out with clear separation and stable ordering.
forbidden_failures: Do not omit required labels or make them too small to read.
Do not use thick arrows, arrow primitives, visible light bars, or foreground light panels.
Do not show component comparisons without labels.
